title: About MeriPehchaan
heading: Know Your User
text:
# Know Your User

You will get verified information about your User who has logged in via MeriPehchaan. Users will be able to reuse the MeriPehchaan profile information to access other Government services.
content:

You will get verified information about your User who has logged in via MeriPehchaan. Users will be able to reuse the MeriPehchaan profile information to access other Government services.
